description: Field-by-field seam mapping between the B12 canary landing-table DDL (delivery_replay_canary_projection, docker/migrations/canary/forward/001_create_delivery_replay_canary_projection.sql) and the B6 omnimarket replay-projection contract (ModelReplayProjection / ModelReplayCursor / ModelDeliveryPosition, node_delivery_replay_projection_compute). Consumed by both sides of the seam: tests/unit/docker/test_canary_ddl_seam_fingerprint.py (this repo, parses the real DDL text) and the omnimarket-side model-fingerprint assertion test (imports this JSON as installed package data). Any edit to this file must be justified by a real DDL or model change in the same PR -- it is not a free-standing spec.

fields.narrowing_reason: The pure-compute model treats correlation_id as an optional echo field (default=None) because the compute node itself has no delivery context to require it. The landing contract is different: the canary readback is correlation-linked (it is the only key the delegation legs carry on the wire), so the DDL intentionally narrows correlation_id to NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY -- a null-correlation_id row must never land. This is a deliberate, enforced narrowing (CHECK: NOT NULL + PK constraint rejects any null insert), not a silent null-acceptance hole.
Model requires min_length=1 (non-empty); DDL enforces NOT NULL + CHECK char_length > 0. Equivalent constraint, not a narrowing.
Model requires min_length=1 (non-empty); DDL enforces NOT NULL + CHECK char_length > 0. Equivalent constraint, not a narrowing.
Model default is an empty tuple (never null); DDL is NOT NULL DEFAULT '[]'::jsonb, materializing the nested tuple as a JSON array of {topic, partition, offset} objects. Equivalent, not a narrowing.
Model has ge=0, default=0; DDL is NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 with a CHECK cursor_event_count >= 0. Equivalent constraint, not a narrowing.
Model has ge=0, default=0; DDL is NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 with a CHECK event_count >= 0. Equivalent constraint, not a narrowing.
Model default=False; DDL is NOT NULL DEFAULT FALSE. Equivalent, not a narrowing.
Model default=False; DDL is NOT NULL DEFAULT FALSE. Equivalent, not a narrowing.
Model default is an empty tuple (never null); DDL is NOT NULL DEFAULT '[]'::jsonb, materializing the tuple of signal labels as a JSON string array. Equivalent, not a narrowing.
